title: DarkUI
description: Minecraft Dark Mode!, Gold Trim Highlights
body:
![DarkUi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc3863ad417f35ab1ec0afb891b9a184732be745.png)


Ease your eyes with DarkUI, a 1.21.1 - 1.21.11 Dark mode texturepack

DarkUI has a black and gold athsetic.
